\section{\LARGE{Technical Solution Manager @ClaimShark (now known as Lyric) | Entrepreneur | TedX Speaker | Blogger}}
\large{

\vspace{0.5em}

A technical and business-focused solo entrepreneur with 7+ years of experience building, managing, and scaling products. Quick to learn, adapt, and innovate to ensure product success.

\vspace{0.5em}

\textbf{Key Achievements:}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=0.15in]
  \item Shipped 4+ enterprise-grade apps and websites with limited resources.
  \item Built and scaled skillShack();, a global hub for programmers, reaching users in 130+ countries.
  \item Part of the Microsoft for Startups Programme.
  \item Frequent speaker at webinars and seminars, including a TedX talk at age 17.
\end{itemize}

\vspace{0.5em}

\textbf{Skills and Experience:}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=0.15in]
  \item Product development, software engineering, DevOps, machine learning, data analysis, big data, system design.
  \item User research, onboarding, feedback incorporation, agile development, digital publishing, writing, video production.
  \item Graphic design, sales, marketing, webinars, motivational speaking.
\end{itemize}

\vspace{0.5em}

I regularly participate in webinars to educate and motivate peers about starting their software journeys and entrepreneurship, while continuously upskilling in software development and product management.
}

\vspace{1em}

\large{
Currently building my startup skillShack();, which is a community for software professionals looking to share the projects they are working on and get feedback. From side projects to startups!
